# Telemetry listener

`CMP-telemetry`

| kind | status | conformance_level | level |
|---|---|---|---|
| component | draft | structural | subsystem |

Subscribes to MAVLink messages on UDP port 14552 and maintains a running state snapshot (position, altitude, heading, airspeed, mode). Also buffers raw messages for the event monitor to inspect for waypoint_reached, altitude_reached, and mode_changed triggers.

## Ports

| port | direction | interface |
|---|---|---|
| state_out | provided | [IFC-telemetry](../../../elements/interfaces/IFC-telemetry.md) |
